projectDescription: An open-source observability data platform for small teams that collects, processes, and forwards logs and events via a lightweight Rust agent.
keyFeatures: Lightweight Rust-based core agent for log and event collection
Multiple source drivers: filesystem, journald, and socket (TCP/UDP/Unix)
LMDB-backed durable recovery and configuration persistence
Hot-reload configuration lifecycle with diff-based apply and validation
TLS, mutual-TLS, and API key authentication support
Prometheus metrics exposition for agent self-monitoring
Environment-aware identity (AWS EC2, Docker, Host, Static)
publicApiSurface: RootConfig — top-level configuration snapshot consumed by the Core Agent
ConfigManager::process_config — validates, diffs, applies and persists a new config snapshot
SourcesConfig — filesystem, journald, and socket source driver configurations
FilesystemSourceConfig — watch paths, patterns and file types for log tailing
JournaldSourceConfig — systemd journal unit collection settings
SocketSourceConfig — TCP/UDP/Unix socket listener with optional TLS
SecurityConfig — global TLS, mTLS, authentication and secret provider settings
StorageConfig — LMDB storage engine settings and cleanup policy
LiveState — runtime state machine for the Core Agent lifecycle
PersistenceEngine — LMDB environment wrapper for durable storage
SourcePayload / SourceOrigin — canonical event model emitted by source drivers
ConfigEvent — observable events produced by the configuration lifecycle manager
validate_root_config — config validation returning typed errors and warnings
diff_root — computes an Operation diff between two RootConfig snapshots
